programme.title: Snatch, (2000, Thriller)
programme.desc: A diamond heist gone haywire launches gangsters, bookies, and a dog on a rollicking ride through the rugged world of bare-knuckle boxing in search of the missing stone. Critically acclaimed comedy from Guy Ritchie.

programme.title: Tango & Cash, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Two hot-shot rival Los Angeles detectives are forced to work together even though they are complete opposites. Finding themselves in prison together after being framed in a drug deal, the unlikely duo break out and go after a crime boss.

programme.title: Next of Kin, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Cop Land, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: Witness, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Get Shorty, (1995, Comedy)
programme.desc: Golden Globe® winner John Travolta stars with Gene Hackman, Danny DeVito and Rene Russo in this wildly popular comedy of a gangster who turns into a big-time producer after he travels to Hollywood to collect a debt from a down-and-out filmmaker.

programme.title: Nightcrawler, (2014, Crime)
programme.desc: A freelance cameraman (Jake Gyllenhaal) goes to increasingly greater lengths to get shots of the most-lurid and disturbing crimes on the dark streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Stranger Than Fiction, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: An IRS auditor suddenly finds himself the subject of narration only he can hear: narration that begins to affect his entire life, from his work, to his love-interest, to his death.

programme.title: The Brothers Bloom, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: The con is on when two swindlers (Adrien Brody, Mark Ruffalo) make an heiress (Rachel Weisz) the target of their next scheme.

programme.title: Kumiko, The Treasure Hunter, (2015, Drama)
programme.desc: Frustrated with her mundane life, a Tokyo office worker (Rinko Kikuchi) becomes obsessed with a fictional movie that she mistakes for a documentary.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: A gang hijacks a subway train and threaten to kill the hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: The Invitation, (2015, Thriller)
programme.desc: In this taut psychological thriller by Karyn Kusama (Girlfight, Jennifer's Body), the tension is palpable when Will shows up to his ex-wife Eden and new husband David's dinner party.

programme.title: Spotlight, (2015, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed film chronicles the true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered a decades-long cover-up of child abuse within the local Catholic Archdiocese.

programme.title: The Road Within, (2014, Drama)
programme.desc: A man with Tourette's syndrome brings his OCD roommate and an anorexic woman along on a road trip to bring his late mother's ashes to the ocean.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity, (2016, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Jeremy Irons and Dev Patel star in this inspirational film about an obscure Indian mathematician whose groundbreaking theories changed mathematics forever.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: While You Were Sleeping, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: Lucy becomes smitten with a handsome stranger.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle, (1993, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan star in an enchanting romance about a widower whose son convinces him to find new love and the woman who answers his call.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding, (1997, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Jules Potter reluctantly realizes she is in love with her best friend Michael. There is just one catch: he's about to marry someone else. Jules will do anything to steal him back... except tell him the simple truth.

programme.title: Next Stop Wonderland, (1998, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A young nurse is forced back into the dating scene by her mother after a bad break up.

programme.title: Party Girl, (1995, Drama)
programme.desc: In this raucous comedy, Parker Posey ("Scream 3") stars as a hard-partying NY club girl who takes a job as a librarian.

programme.title: Awakenings, (1990, Drama)
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and Robin Williams star in a story of the consequences of a maverick doctor's medical miracle. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail, (1975, Best of British Humor)
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Monty Python's Life of Brian, (1979, Best of British Humor)
programme.desc: A notorious religious satire, the film tells the story of Brian (Graham Chapman), a reluctant would-be messiah who rises to prominence as a result of a series of absurd and truly hilarious circumstances.

programme.title: The Kentucky Fried Movie, (1977, Variety)
programme.desc: Series of short, highly irreverent, and quite often tasteless skits.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: King Kong, (1976, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A petroleum exploration expedition comes to an isolated island and encounters a colossal giant gorilla.

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth, (1976, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Thomas Jerome Newton (David Bowie) is a humanoid alien who comes to Earth to get water for his dying planet. He starts a high technology company to get the billions of dollars he needs to build a return spacecraft.

programme.title: Boy in the Plastic Bubble, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: The girl next door makes a teen (John Travolta) born with immune deficiencies want to leave his germ-free bubble.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Trapped in a Card
programme.desc: It’s a case of mistaken identity when Yuya is eyed as the primary suspect for attacking Leo students! But when Yuya crosses paths with the real culprit, things go from bad to worse!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Quiz Quagmire: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya matches minds with the quiz whiz extraordinaire Pierre L’Supérieure in a duel of wits! Can Yuya outsmart the smartest boy on Earth, or will Yuya end up scratching his head in defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Quiz Quagmire: Part 2
programme.desc: In the finale of the mind-bending match that’s part-duel, part-quiz show - one wrong answer could mean curtains for Yuya! Can he outduel and outthink a trivia whiz who’s never wrong?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Beyond Belief
programme.desc: Duelists throughout the city are continuously being attacked, and everyone is on the search to find out the who, how and why!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Date With Fate: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya’s future takes a terrifying turn for the worse when he battles a fortunetelling foe who predicts this will be his last duel ever! Can Yuya fix his fate and avoid a devastating disaster, or has his luck finally run out?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Date With Fate: Part 2
programme.desc: As Yuya’s battle against the fortunetelling predictress Aura flares to its finish, it becomes crystal clear that Yuya’s danger-filled future is becoming a reality!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: For Our Tomorrows
programme.desc: Mysteries are revealed when the masked duelist who’s been terrorizing Leo Institute students is confronted and challenged to a battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Between Buddies: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya needs one more win to get into the Championship, but it will be his most difficult battle yet when he discovers he has to beat his best bud Gong in order to move on!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Between Buddies: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between best buds Yuya and Gong for a spot in the Arc League Championships rages to a friend-zied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Challengers Assemble
programme.desc: Let the games begin! The top duelists from around the globe have gathered together for the Arc League Championships to find out who’s the best duelist in the world!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie’s deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fusion Foes
programme.desc: Zuzu takes center stage in an epic rematch against Leo Institute’s dueling diamond, Julia Krystal! Will Zuzu avenge her earlier loss and walk away a winner, or will history repeat itself and leave Zuzu singing the blues?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Gong the Strong
programme.desc: When Gong’s old sparring partner sets a trap for Yuya, the only way Gong can save his friend is to forfeit his duel and get tossed from the tourney!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1
programme.desc: Sylvio finally has just the thing to take Yuya down – a deck full of Pendulum Cards! Could Yuya's days in the spotlight be done for?
programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuya is off his game and on the run as Sylvio zeroes in on zeroing out his life points! If Yuya can’t get into the swing of things, this could be his final performance!
programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 1
programme.desc: Sora is psyched to put on a showstopping duel for the fans, but his opponent Shay is set to turn Sora’s one man show into a no man show!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 2
programme.desc: Sora and Shay's heated duel hits its boiling point when dark secrets about their hidden history come to light! Could there be something sinister behind Sora’s sweet-toothed smile?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 1
programme.desc: While Yuto is looking for answers, Sora is looking to get some revenge! But when these two tangle, Yuya finds out more than he ever expected!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 2
programme.desc: Surprises are in the cards as the battle between Sora and Yuto comes to an unexpected conclusion! But just when Yuya thinks he’s seen everything, a new face shows up on the scene that makes Yuya do a triple take!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Dark Reflection
programme.desc: Yuya can’t believe his eyes when he finds himself standing face-to-face-to-face with two lookalikes who are out to destroy each other… and everything in sight!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Warped Dimensions
programme.desc: Yuya is in a coma, and nothing has been able to stir him from his terrifying state! Is Yuya down for the count, or will his duelmate’s ESP and TLC make him A-OK?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Duel Personality
programme.desc: It’s time for the second round of the Arc League Championship! Yuya is pitted against his polar opposite – a duelist who doesn't duel to entertain, but rather put his foes into pain!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Stealth Warriors
programme.desc: When a mysterious visitor threatens to throw the Championship into chaos, Declan moves in to uncover who they are and soon finds himself facing off against a merciless mercenary!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Bracing for Battle
programme.desc: Declan confronts Celina and shares a story from their past that reveals a frightening future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Fields
programme.desc: It’s time for a nail biting battle royal in the ARC League Championship! With four battle zones to choose from, the action has never been more mesmerizing or the duels more dangerous!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: While Yuya is looking to knock the competition out cold in the Volcano Zone, the Iceberg Zone is heating up as Zuzu and Gong team up to defrost their foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Danger Zones
programme.desc: As the battle royal rumbles on, Yuya finds himself caught in the crossfire when he stumbles across a battle between not-so-noble Knights!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Obelisk Assault
programme.desc: Yuya takes on a terrifying trio from Fusion Dimension who turn their victims into cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dragon's Vengeance
programme.desc: Outnumbered, outmatched, and out of options, will Yuya tap into a deep-seeded darkness to overcome defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Zuzu races to stay one step ahead of a cold-blooded hunter who's hot on her heels! Can Zuzu ditch this danger, or will he prove too cunning for her to escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battlefronts
programme.desc: Sparks fly in the Volcano Zone when all our heroes face off against the full fury of Fusion Dimension’s elite Obelisk Force! With more than life points on the line, the action has never been hotter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fighting for Fun
programme.desc: Are friends now foes as Yuya and Sora go deck to deck in a fiery face-off?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling Declan
programme.desc: When Yuya discovers Declan's web of lies put his friends in danger, he challenges Declan to a battle as payback!

programme.title: Luffy continues to battle Fake-mingo, but keeps accidentally battling Bellamy instead. Meanwhile the tide of battle turns against Law as painful scars from the past resurface. And Zoro gets unexpected help in his battle with Pica.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Intense Battle! Law vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Bellamy escapes Doflamingo's control, but it might be too late. His long history with Doflamingo unfolds and leads to an inglorious end. Meanwhile, Hajrudin has been beaten down, but a fire still burns in him to pay back the favor he owes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle Against the Executives! Proud Hajrudin!

programme.title: Lao G and Don Chinjao duke it out as each brings their most devastating attacks to the battle. But a misunderstanding caused by Baby 5 has Sai and Don Chinjao distracted - are they distracted enough for Lao G to gain the upper hand?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Battle of Love! The New Leader Sai vs. Baby 5!

programme.title: Law is at the whim of Doflamingo and Trebol, while Luffy still has to deal with Bellamy, who fights to keep his honor even after being released by Doflamingo! Meanwhile, Gladius is about to detonate the ground around Cavendish and Bartolomeo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Man's Pride! Bellamy's Last Charge!

programme.title: A mysterious force that resembles Cavendish menaces the battlefield - but while it appears to help Bartolomeo and the others at first, it sets its sights on Robin! Meanwhile, the deeply-wounded Ideo sees Dellinger's horrible true nature!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Strong Wind and a Surge! Hakuba vs. Dellinger!

programme.title: Bartolomeo is in a neck-and-neck battle against Gladius to save Robin, and is faced with an impossible dilemma. With all his options leading to their defeat, can his cunning ploy save the day? Meanwhile, Robin is face to face with Cavendish.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Princess Mansherry's amazing power - to heal living beings completely - is in the hands of the Donquixote executive. If she is able to heal all the executives who've gone down in battle - the Straw Hats and their allies stand no chance!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Señor Pink and Franky continue their knock-down, drag-out, manly fight. As both of them are pushed to their limits, we learn Señor's tragic past! Meanwhile, Princess Mansherry's rescue hits a snag as she stubbornly refuses to leave!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Manly Duel! Señor's Elegy of Love!

programme.title: Franky and Señor Pink end their harrowing duel in a manly way - but victory knocks the wind out of even the winner's sails! Meanwhile, Diamante and Kyros struggle desperately on the Sunflower Field, each demonstrating their extreme prowess.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Stardust of Death! Diamante's Storm of Vicious Attacks!

programme.title: Kyros, unbowed by Diamante's vicious attacks, fights back with the anger and retribution of all of Dressrosa in order to fulfill his promise to protect Rebecca. If he is successful, only a few executives will remain.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Pica loses his temper and turns his full wrath against King Riku, whom he hopes to destroy, ending the revolution against Doflamingo. Meanwhile, Zoro, who has been distracted by Pica and drawn far from the battle, has to hatch a plan to save the king!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Moving Across the Ground! The Giant Statue Pica's Surprise Maneuver!

programme.title: With the lives of King Riku, Usopp, and the others on the old King's Plateau in the balance, Zoro must dig deep and discover a powerful technique to counter Pica's near-unstoppable onslaught. Meanwhile, King Riku ponders what it means to be a good king.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle in Midair! Zoro's New Special Secret Technique Blasts!

programme.title: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Blade of Tenacity! The Gamma Knife Counterattack!

programme.title: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Collision of Haki! Luffy vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Unassailable! The Stunning Secret of Trebol!

programme.title: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Anger Erupts! I Will Take Everything upon Myself!

programme.title: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Flame Dragon King! Protect Luffy's Life!

programme.title: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: As Long as We Breathe! Stop the Deadly Birdcage!

programme.title: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dead or Alive! A Fateful Countdown!

programme.title: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Attack on a Celestial! Luffy's King Kong Gun of Anger!

programme.title: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Unheard-of! Admiral Fujitora’s Surprising Decision!

programme.title: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sending a Shock Wave! The Worst Generation Goes Into Action!

programme.title: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Birth of the Legend! The Adventures of the Revolutionary Warrior Sabo!

programme.title: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Brothers' Bond! The Untold Story Behind Luffy and Sabo's Reunion!

programme.title: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Creature! One of the Four Emperors - Kaido, King of the Beasts!

programme.title: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fujitora Takes Action! The Complete Siege of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: Super 8, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane, (2016, Thriller)
programme.desc: After a car crash, a woman wakes up in a survivalist’s bunker. He claims to have saved her from an apocalyptic attack, but, growing suspicious of his motives, she'll have to escape to discover the truth.

programme.title: Chato's Land, (1972, Drama)
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High, (1968, Drama)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: God Forgives, I Don't, (1967, Drama)
programme.desc: A fast-shooting gunman and an insurance agent track down the murdering robbers of a train hijacking and the stolen money.

programme.title: Down Mexico Way, (1941, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley chase crooked film producers to Mexico where they must prevent the evil producers from swindling a Mexican rancher and his daughter, and expose them for the schemers they are.

programme.title: Sierra Sue, (1941, Drama)
programme.desc: State Inspector Gene Autry helps ranchers rid their ranches of poisonous devil weed threatening cattle. The ranchers want to burn the area, but Gene thinks chemical spraying via airplane is in order.

programme.title: Cowboy Serenade, (1942, Drama)
programme.desc: When a young man is sent to sell cattle to a packing plant, he is soon swindled by card sharks. Gene Autry is sent to investigate and recover the cattle, find the young man, and clear his name.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians, (1976, Drama)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: Little Big Man, (1970, Drama)
programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: Mean Girls, (2004, Screwball)
programme.desc: Cady thinks she understands "survival of the fittest." However, the law of the wild takes a whole new meaning when the homeschooled 15-year-old enters public high school for the first time.

programme.title: Georgia Rule, (2007, Screwball)
programme.desc: A troubled young woman is sent to live with her grandmother for the summer, while hiding a secret that could potentially tear her family apart.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: A girl finds she is forced to educate herself on the etiquette of wooing the opposite sex when she finally meets Mr. Right.

programme.title: Big Fish, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Throughout his life, Edward Bloom (Ewan McGregor) has always been a man of big appetites, enormous passions and tall tales.

programme.title: Across the Universe, (2007, Musical)
programme.desc: A love story about a British boy and an American girl set against the backdrop of the social upheaval of the 1960s.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tiger’s Eye approaches Naru in a plot to capture Pegasus in a subspace cage invented by Hawk’s Eye.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Two of Mamoru’s friends from college, Saori and Kobayashi, pay him a visit at his apartment in the hopes of meeting his girlfriend Usagi.
programme.sub-title: The Perfect Couple: Usagi and Mamoru's Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru is helping Usagi and Chibi-Usa with their studies when Luna and Artemis walk in, having a huge fight.
programme.sub-title: Artemis is Cheating? Enter the Mysterious Kitten

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls learn that Tomoko Takase, author of the best-selling book The Moon Night Pegasus, used to be Makoto's classmate from her previous school.
programme.sub-title: Makoto's Friendship: The Girl Who Admired Pegasus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tiger's Eye hatches a plan to capture Pegasus by using a Lemures that can enter other people's shadow and control them from within.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A small fire incident leaves Mamoru's apartment in a total mess, forcing him to stay at Rei's place for the time being.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa bumps into a young man after becoming enthralled in a beautiful illustration book she had Usagi buy for her.
programme.sub-title: Forest of Illusion: A Beautiful Fairy's Invitation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami is shocked when she sees Mamoru coming out of his apartment with another woman.
programme.sub-title: Drive to the Heavens: The Dream Car Fueled with Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa befriends Miharu, who is aiming to be the best swordwoman in Japan.
programme.sub-title: Aiming for the Top: The Pretty Swordswoman's Dilemma

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Yoshiki Usui’s new store opens. Usagi and her friends head out to see the fashion show, along with Fish’s Eye, who is captivated by Usui's good looks.
programme.sub-title: We Love Fashion: The Stylish Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi spots Minako out on a date with a handsome man. To everyone's surprise, the boyfriend is different from the one Usagi saw earlier.
programme.sub-title: Storm of Love: Minako's Grand Two-Timing Plan

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: An old woman named Mayako lives alone in a mansion. Mayako is very distrustful of strangers, believing they are after her wealth and fortune.
programme.sub-title: The Secret Mansion: A Menu of Love for You

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Reports of Pegasus attacking the town cause Usagi and the other Sailor Guardians to have doubts about whether Pegasus can be trusted or not.
programme.sub-title: Believe in Pegasus: The Four Guardians' Super Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends are enjoying their summer vacation by the beach. Shingo is acting as their bodyguard—especially for Ami, whom he has a crush on.
programme.sub-title: Shining Summer Days: Ami Under the Sea-Breeze

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa see an ad for a free ballet lesson and sign up. As they practice, Fish’s Eye draws the class's attention with his dancing skills.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa meet a woman named Rubina who follows them. Rubina is a princess who snuck out to experience life outside of her royal duties.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls attend the school festival. Makoto is asked to dance by a handsome man, who is actually Tiger's Eye in disguise.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Fish's Eye goes after Mamoru. But Mamoru seems to show no interest in being with anyone besides Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Shadow of Evil: The Trio's Last Chance

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Zirconia threatens the Amazon Trio that if they don’t capture Pegasus by the next new moon, the magic making them human will wear off.
programme.sub-title: Mirrors of Dreams: The Amazon's Last Stage

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to see a show at the Dead Moon Circus. But Momo starts acting peculiar and leaves, causing Chibi-Usa to become worried.
programme.sub-title: The Amazoness: Nightmare from Behind the Mirrors

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami falls in love with a melody she finds online. She works on lyrics that match the melody and also goes to meet the composer, Toshiyuki Nishino.
programme.sub-title: True Power Explodes: Ami's Melody of the Heart

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei becomes famous after posing for a magazine. A girl named Nanako, expresses her desire to study under Rei so that she can become just like her.
programme.sub-title: Flames of Passion: Mars's Raging Super Attack

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa go to the dentist to get their cavities treated. The dental clinic is actually a trap set up by Palla-Palla to find Pegasus.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto compete to win the heart of Honjo, a young principal. But their rivalry starts to put a strain on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Clash of Dreams: Minako and Makoto's Broken Friendship

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa’s school is having a sports day. However, one of its main events is jumping over the vaulting box, which Chibi-Usa is not very good at.
programme.sub-title: Overcome Your Fear: The Jump to Freedom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of Your Dreams: The Mirror of Truth

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.
programme.sub-title: Pegasus's Secret: The Boy Who Protects the Dream World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.
programme.sub-title: Dream to be an Adult: The Amazoness' Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Motion: The Dark Queen's Evil Hand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.
programme.sub-title: The Source of Darkness: Dead Moon Circus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.
programme.sub-title: Labyrinth of Mirrors: Chibi Moon Captured

programme.title: I, Frankenstein, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Still alive in modern times, Frankenstein's creature (Aaron Eckhart) becomes caught in the middle, as gargoyles and demons wage war for the souls of mankind.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder, the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Hellboy, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: I, Frankenstein, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Still alive in modern times, Frankenstein's creature (Aaron Eckhart) becomes caught in the middle, as gargoyles and demons wage war for the souls of mankind.

programme.title: Hellboy, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Hellboy, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Twilight, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A high-school student is caught up in a romance with a vampire, whose family has renounced the drinking of blood.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Bella must choose between Edward and Jacob amid a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire's quest for revenge.

programme.title: Julie & Julia, (2009, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Julie & Julia, tells the true stories of how Julia Child's life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking.

programme.title: Adaptation, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Director Spike Jonze delivers a stunningly original comedy that seamlessly blends fictional characters and situations with the lives of real people. As Charlie struggles to adapt Orlean's best-selling book "The Orchid Thief".Rated: R

programme.title: Conectado, (1970)

programme.title: Guerreiros do Amanhã, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sete jovens saem da cidade para passar um fim de semana inesquecível acampando no meio da natureza selvagem. Na volta, sua cidade já não é a mesma, suas famílias desapareceram, e eles são os únicos capazes de lutar para libertar seu povo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Além do Horizonte, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A população da Terra volta a ser aterrorizada por naves alienígenas que emitem luzes azuis e sugam as pessoas. O policial Mark começa uma luta implacável contra esses inimigos quando seu filho é capturado. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Inimiga Perfeita, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um famoso arquiteto conhece uma jovem enquanto espera por seu voo em um terminal que ele mesmo projetou. Os dois se aproximam e ela insiste em lhe contar sua sinistra história de vida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Osso Duro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Deacon viaja às Filipinas para doar um rim para sua sobrinha doente. Depois de uma noite de romance, ele descobre que uma mulher o enganou e roubou seu rim. Deacon começa uma violenta corrida contra o tempo para recuperar o órgão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Dom da Premonição, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Viúva com o dom da premonição resolve ler a sorte dos moradores da cidade para sustentar os filhos, o que lhe rende a desconfiança dos mais conservadores. Para complicar, ocorre um assassinato cuja solução depende de sua clarividência. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Recruta Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mega Valentine é uma estrela de cinema à beira da falência. Quando vê a chance de estrelar em um filme baseado no serviço militar, decide alistar-se no Exército para convencer o produtor da obra de que ela é a atriz ideal para o papel principal. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Norman - Confie em Mim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Norman Oppenheimer é um picareta do mercado financeiro que tenta sua sorte na cidade de Nova York. Tentando ser amigo de todos, ele força seu caminho até se infiltrar no círculo interno de ricaços e de figurões da política. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Agente Mirim, (1970)

programme.title: Nezha - Correndo pela Vida, (1970)

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)

programme.title: Perdido em Londres, (1970)

programme.desc: Naruto: As Cinco Super Batalhas Ninja! - T01E202

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra uma jovem menina chamada Yakumo desenhando algo estranho. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU e os médicos ninja chegam para levá-la. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada - T01E203

programme.title: 2020. Naruto sonha que Yakumo deseja se tornar uma ninja e Kurenai ameaça selar o poder dela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Poder Selado De Yakumo - T01E204

programme.title: 2020. Os atacantes são membros da clã Kurama da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Naruto e os outros vão à vila para proteger Yakumo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage
programme.desc: Naruto: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage - T01E205

programme.title: 2020. Naruto vai para o hospital, quando Unkai, o ninja que os atacou na vila, aparece. Eles procuram pela aldeia e chegam a uma teoria baseada nos movimentos dos insetos parasitas de Shino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Genjutsu Ou Realidade? - T01E206

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Yakumo pôs Kurenai numa situação desesperada, e o terrível segredo da vila Kurama é revelado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Habilidade Supostamente Selada - T01E207

programme.title: 2020. A missão de Naruto e Kiba é proteger a premiada tigela de chá e ir até o cliente Shinemon. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Peso Do Artefato Premiado! - T01E208

programme.title: 2020. Gantetsu, um Ninja Renegado, pede que alguém o acompanhe para sair da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Inimigo: O Ninja Renegado - T01E209

programme.title: 2020. Depois de evadir a emboscada dos Ninjas Renegados, Naruto, Gantetsu e Todoroki acabam num labirinto de floresta que confunde o senso de direção humana. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Desconcertante Floresta - T01E210

programme.title: 2020. O relacionamento entre Gantetsu e Todoroki é revelado, e a tensão entre os dois aumenta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordação Das Chamas - T01E211

programme.title: 2020. Depois de uma batalha intensa, Naruto consegue encurralar o inimigo, mas um menino é levado embora. O menino é Akio, o irmão mais novo de Todoroki e presumido morto por Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Para Cada Um Seu Próprio Caminho
programme.desc: Naruto: Para Cada Um Seu Próprio Caminho - T01E212

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra um jovem que está ferido e que perdeu a memória. Tsunade é cautelosa com a presença do menino, mas Naruto fica impressionado pela bondade do garoto e insiste que ele fique. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Lembranças Desaparecidas - T01E213

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade acredita que há uma conexão entre Menma e a Aldeia Escondida do Som. Naruto e os outros vão para o País dos Arrozais para dar uma olhada nas memórias de Menma. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Voltando À Realidade - T01E214

programme.title: 2020. Durante a batalha, Naruto descobre que Menma é um membro de uma gangue de bandidos que atacou sua aldeia. Chamado de traidor pelo líder da gangue, Menma revela seu maior segredo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Passado A Ser Apagado - T01E215

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade coloca Shikamaru numa missão para resolver o sequestro de Matsuri, uma candidata ninja da Aldeia da Areia, cometido pelos quatro celestiais. Os genins da Folha são chamados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Shukaku É O Alvo - T01E216

programme.title: 2020. Shino, Hinata e Neji procuram pelo inimigo enquanto Shikamaru espera pelo momento certo para atacar. A verdadeira intenção dos quatro celestiais é capturar Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Aliança Dos Shinobi Da Areia Com A Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: A Aliança Dos Shinobi Da Areia Com A Folha - T01E217

programme.title: 2020. Os oponentes de Gaara armam uma armadilha. Gaara acaba sendo preso pelo jutsu secreto Formação de Escala Reversa e sua areia é completamente selada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Areia Selada:O Contra-Ataque! - T01E218

programme.title: 2020. Gaara e Naruto encurralam Hoko, o último dos quatro celestiais, num vale. Eles descobrem que o objetivo deles era roubar o chacra de Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e assim ter o poder para desafiar as Cinco Grandes Nações. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Derradeira Arma Renasce - T01E219

programme.title: 2020. Gaara se transforma em Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e obtém uma vitória impressionante. Depois da batalha, alguns descobrem novos caminhos para seguir, e Naruto decide ser ainda mais forte ao ir numa jornada de treinamento com Jiraiya. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Partida - T01E220

programme.title: 2020. Bem-vindo à Aldeia Oculta da folha, onde ninjas assassinos percorrem a terra, e o travesso Naruto Uzumaki apronta encrenca aonde for. Ao roubar o antigo pergaminho do selo, ele libera um poder único raramente visto em um garoto de 12 anos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Naruto Uzumaki Chegando! - T01E01

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente se forma na Academia Ninja e diz que sabe tudo. Bom, pelo menos é isso que ele conta para Konohamaru, o neto tampinha do líder da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Meu Nome É Konohamaru - T01E02

programme.title: 2020. Para se tornar um ninja, Naruto precisa formar uma equipe com seus colegas, a bela Sakura e o sério Sasuke, que têm uma coisa em comum: o ódio que sentem por Naruto. Então, Naruto tenta conquistar Sakura fingindo ser a paixão da vida dela... Sasuke! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos
programme.desc: Naruto: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos - T01E03

programme.title: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04

programme.title: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08

programme.title: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09

programme.title: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10

programme.title: 2020. Na aldeia com Tazuna, Sakura vê o sofrimento do povo no País das Ondas governado por Gato. Tazuna constrói uma ponte que dará acesso a outras terras para as pessoas não dependerem mais de Gato. Naruto e Sasuke treinam, usando chakra para subir em árvore. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu - T01E11

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto treina para controlar seu chacra, alguém misterioso aparece de repente e diz que, para se tornar forte, é preciso ter determinação para proteger o que ama. A figura misteriosa ecoa o sentimento de Naruto, e os dois sentem uma conexão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Na Ponte: Zabuza Retorna - T01E12

programme.title: 2020. É hora de lutar contra Zabuza outra vez, e agora ele está acompanhado do ninja rastreador. Os dois reparam as habilidades de Sasuke, e ele percebe o imenso poder do ninja mascarado. Sasuke e o ninja se preparam para lutar, como se o destino os chamasse. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo
programme.desc: Naruto: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo - T01E13

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke está em apuros dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku, e Naruto chega para salvá-lo. Sasuke tem um plano para combater o jutsu de Haku, mas falha por causa das ações inesperadas de Naruto. Por fim, os dois jovens ninjas são presos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga - T01E14

programme.title: 2020. Vendo que não há tempo a perder, Kakashi decide usar o Sharingan mais uma vez para derrotar Zabuza. Mas Zabuza é um ninja experiente em batalhas mortais e, na primeira vez em que enfrentou o Sharingan, Zabuza conseguiu bolar uma estratégia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Visibilidade Zero: O Sharingan Desvendado - T01E15

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke são atacados dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku. Durante a batalha, Sasuke percebe o poder do seu próprio Sharingan e começa a desviar dos ataques de Haku. Haku decide acabar com ele. Sasuke usa seu corpo para proteger Naruto... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Selo Quebrado - T01E16

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente explode! Sua raiva por Haku libera o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. O chakra de Naruto está tão intenso que até Kakashi e Zabuza, que estão lutando à distância, percebem. Haku é incapaz de fazer algo diante do poder secreto de Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Passado Branco, Ambição Escondida - T01E17

programme.title: 2020. Haku pede a Naruto que acabe com ele. Naruto questiona a filosofia de Haku sobre existir apenas para lutar e ganhar. Enquanto isso, a batalha entre Kakashi e Zabuza chega ao clímax. Com a vitória ao alcance, Kakashi libera sua manobra mais devastadora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Armas Conhecidas Como Shinobi - T01E18

programme.title: 2020. Pensando em Haku, Naruto confronta Zabuza com raiva. Sem demonstrar emoções, Zabuza se sente arrasado pela perda de Haku, a única pessoa em quem confiava no mundo. Naruto aprende que esse tipo de realidade cruel é, de fato, o destino de um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Demônio Na Neve - T01E19

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe voltam à Aldeia Oculta da Folha depois da batalha do País das Ondas. Mesmo concluindo novas missões, Naruto está insatisfeito com a rotina diária, mas logo ele descobre que estrangeiros estão se juntando na Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin - T01E20

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura são escolhidos para fazer a Prova Chunin. Iruka se opõe à participação dos três, pois os considera muito novos e inexperientes para o desafio. Kakashi, porém, acredita que eles cresceram e estão mais prontos do que nunca. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Identifique-Se : Novos E Poderosos Rivais - T01E21

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se preparam para a prova, um ninja chamado Rock Lee aparece. Lee quer lutar contra Sasuke, que possui o poder do clã Uchiha. Sasuke aceita o desafio de Lee, mas fica só na defesa devido aos ataques rápidos desse oponente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke - T01E22

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se inscrevem oficialmente para a Prova Chunin e formam um time. Para passar, nenhum membro pode falhar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam - T01E23

programme.title: 2023. Um novo aluno, Duke Devlin, derrota Joey em um jogo de Duel Monsters, forçando Joey a ser seu servo. Duke força Joey a usar um uniforme de cachorro e o humilha em público, forçando Yugi a desafiar Duke para um duelo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E46

programme.title: 2023. Em troca da liberdade de Joey, Yugi concorda em desistir de Duel Monsters para sempre se ele perder. Sem conhecer bem as regras, Yugi começa mal. As chances dele não melhoram, e Duke revela que criou Monstros dos Dados-Masmorra com a ajuda de Pegasus! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E47

programme.title: 2023. Yugi usa suas habilidades de jogo natas para virar a mesa contra Duke, mas Duke menciona mais uma regra: todas as criaturas ocupam território no tabuleiro-grade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E48

programme.title: 2023. Depois que o todo-poderoso Orgoth, o Implacável de Duke deixa toda a esquadra de monstros de Yugi em pedaços, Yugi só tem mais um turno antes de perder todos os seus pontos de vida! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E49

programme.title: 2023. Um cartomante arcano rouba o Enigma do Milênio, e Yugi precisa defendê-lo em um duelo para recuperá-lo! No entanto, não se trata de um simples advinho. Ele é um inimigo familiar e formidável do Reino dos Duelistas. Ou talvez não? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Orochimaru Versus Jinchuriki - T01E42
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi encontra Itachi Uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Guy e sua equipe começam a lutar contra um amargo rival, Kisame, que lança um poderoso chakra para subjugar o ninja da folha. Seu jutsu aprisiona Neji, Lee e Tenten. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lágrimas De Sakura - T01E43
programme.desc: 2008. Guy se arrepende ao ver seus três alunos presos. Determinado a parar Kisame, Guy o desafia usando o nunchaku. Sem oxigênio, Tenten vai ficando fraca, e Guy se prepara para usar um jutsu secreto e proibido. Naruto cai no genjutsu de Itachi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Da Batalha - T01E44
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo e Sakura salvam Naruto do genjutsu de Itachi. Kakashi começa um contra-ataque e exibe toda sua destreza. Guy enfrenta dificuldades contra Kisame, mas o derrota com um poderoso jutsu. Os ninjas da folha conseguem derrotar seu arquiminigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Consequências Da Traição - T01E45
programme.desc: 2008. Kisame e Itachi parecem ter sido clones cujos poderes foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. Vovó Chiyo explica a conexão entre a besta de cauda e o jinchuriki. Sakura percebe que Naruto enfrenta o mesmo destino e lágrimas escorrem em seu rosto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Página Inacabada - T01E46
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Infiltração: O Covil Da Cobra! - T01E47
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki, mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. Neji usa seu byakugan para localizar os selos e os ninjas destroem a barreira. Naruto tem uma visão chocante. A equipe Guy encara uma armadilha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. Ela tenta capturar Sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre Orochimaru, invocando dois bonecos para esta batalha. Naruto e Kakashi ainda perseguem Deidara! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. Chiyo e Sakura se protegem, Sasori faz um ataque implacável. Sakura toma uma decisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. O ataque da areia de ferro penetra o espaço, Sakura é atingida na mão e é infectada pelo veneno! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pesadelo - T02E54
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto que ela tomou e que funciona durante cerca de três minutos. Chiyo e Sakura decidem derrotar Sasori nesse prazo. Sasori usa seu último trunfo. Naruto e Kakashi planejam capturar Deidara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Vento - T02E55
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura e Vovó Chiyo derrotam Sasori, mas ele acaba revivendo. Chiyo invoca bonecos com a técnica do ataque branco secreto, e Sasori aplica seu ataque vermelho secreto. O antídoto de Sakura perde efeito, mas ela e Chiyo iniciam uma decisiva batalha final! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contorção - T02E56
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo usa o último antídoto em Sakura. Sasori tenta pôr fim à vida de Vovó Chiyo, mas ela revida e o derrota. Sakura é atingida em um lugar vital, e a única coisa que pode salvá-la é um jutsu que a Vovó Chiyo criou uma vez para Sasori. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Despertar Do Sono Eterno - T02E57
programme.desc: 2008. Os ninjas da equipe Guy se preocupam com o resultado da luta de Sakura e Vovó Chiyo enquanto enfrentam suas cópias, que permanecem firmes! Naruto segue Deidara, que se apoderou de Gaara. A preparação para a nova técnica de Kakashi está em andamento! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Solidão - T02E58
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura corre para achar Naruto com Vovó Chiyo, sofrendo envenenada. Kakashi revela seu mangekyo sharingan, um poderoso jutsu que transporta tudo o que o olho pode ver para outra dimensão. Naruto finalmente consegue salvar Gaara, mas fica enfurecido ... programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Inimigo - T02E59
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contato - T02E61

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Dois Reis - T02E63
